title: begonia × crispa
intro: Begonia × crispa, also known as Polysoma or Begonia leaf, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Begoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia × crispa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
